bea5_overlap_policy: not_excluded; disclosed; BEA-5 used success-quota over the same full available Python frame and did not consume the entire frame, so overlap with BEA-5 evaluated records is possible. This is P3 smoke evidence, not fresh disjoint validation.
bea_v04_p1_overlap_policy: not_excluded; disclosed; P3 reuses the P1 frame and re-runs candidate pools and arms in one process; does NOT infer from the P1 aggregate. P1+P3 overlap possible. Not fresh disjoint validation.
bea_v04_p2_overlap_policy: not_excluded; disclosed; P3 reuses the P2 frame (budget=5, methods bm25 regex symbol, same caps and windows) and reuses the P2 repaired target anchor; does NOT infer from the P2 aggregate. P2+P3 overlap possible. Not fresh disjoint validation.
